tenders.title: Working Jointly in Agriculture, Commercial Joint Venture Operations Call
tenders.eligibility: Tech-enabled logistics partners, input suppliers, and agritech systems for co-execution of scaled joint production operations
tenders.notes: Open commercial procurement call seeking technology-enabled logistics partners, input suppliers and agritech systems to co-execute scaled joint agricultural production operations in Tanzania.

tenders.body: Eastern Africa Statistical Frameworks / Zanzibar Statistical Division
tenders.title: National Food Balance Sheet (FBS) Digital Compilation Support, Consultancy
tenders.eligibility: Consultants with expertise in statistical data architectures, digital compilation systems and food security data modelling
tenders.notes: Provision of consulting services to design data collection architectures for the regional Food Balance Sheet (FBS) compilation tracking models. Deadline extended to 15 July 2026. TZT Ref No: 144446185 (ECST Call).

tenders.body: Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations (FAO Tanzania)
tenders.title: Supervision of Livestock Infrastructure Construction, Charcoal Earth Dams & Boreholes
tenders.volume: Multiple sites across primary livestock corridors
tenders.eligibility: Engineering supervision firms with experience in civil works monitoring, water infrastructure and rural construction supervision
tenders.notes: Field procurement for engineering supervision firms to monitor infrastructure rehabilitation and civil construction works of charcoal earth dams, solar-powered boreholes and production-level water points across primary livestock corridors.

tenders.body: Tanzania Official Seed Certification Institute (TOSCI), via NeST
tenders.title: Public Awareness and E-Label System Integration Consultancy
tenders.eligibility: Consultancy firms with experience in digital certification systems, e-labelling, supply chain authentication and stakeholder sensitization in the agricultural inputs sector
tenders.notes: Designing and executing sensitization protocols for seed sector stakeholders on deployment of cryptographic e-labels to verify input supply-chain authenticity. Published via the National e-Procurement System of Tanzania (NeST).

tenders.body: United Nations International Procurement / Government of Tanzania (DMDP2 Portfolio)
tenders.title: Feasibility Studies for Circular Organic Waste Management & Composting, Dar es Salaam
tenders.eligibility: Consulting firms with expertise in circular economy, organic waste recovery, urban waste stream mapping and composting logistics
tenders.notes: Mapping urban and market organic streams in Dar es Salaam to identify scalable, technology-backed options for corporate organic waste recovery and regional composting logistics. Flagship DMDP2 portfolio, published via UN Global Marketplace.

tenders.body: The Royal Norwegian Society for Development (Norges Vel)
tenders.title: Value Chain Evaluation & Resilient Agriculture Mid-Term Review, Tanzania
tenders.eligibility: Specialised multi-country evaluation teams with expertise in agricultural value chain assessment, climate-resilient farming systems and producer-owned business ecosystem analysis
tenders.notes: Seeking a specialised evaluation team to assess agricultural value chains and build data-driven approaches to optimise climate-resilient farming and producer-owned business ecosystems in Tanzania. Published via Devex International Procurement Board.

tenders.title: Procurement of Non-Consultancy Services for Crop Revenue Collection
tenders.eligibility: Firms able to design and operate automated regional crop cess and revenue collection frameworks
tenders.notes: Technical execution contract to design and operate automated regional crop cess and revenue collection frameworks.

tenders.title: Expressions of Interest for Construction Supervision of One Stop Border Post (OSBP)
tenders.eligibility: Firms with construction supervision experience for cross-border infrastructure projects
tenders.notes: Provision of supervision services for Phase 1 construction of the Manyovu/Mugina One Stop Border Post on the Tanzania side, to streamline cross-border trade logistics.

tenders.title: Supply and Commissioning of Solar Pumping Systems
tenders.eligibility: Suppliers of solar pumping systems with commissioning capability
tenders.notes: Supply and commissioning of solar-powered pumping systems for agricultural water access.
